nodes.text: The Chief sent you? Hah! He's more desperate than I thought.
But the spirits don't laugh. They showed me someone small would make the journey.
Take this Crystal Lens. It reveals truth hidden in stone. You'll need it in the mountain ruins.
The Crystal Lens shows what's hidden. The mountain holds many secrets.
A gemstone from the mountain... That's one of the three relics. The shrine awaits.
I saw this in the flames, Grub. You were always meant to be the one.
